member.name: T:StevanFreeborn.Options.Option
member.summary: Provides factory methods for creating .

member.name: M:StevanFreeborn.Options.Option.Some``1(``0)
member.summary: Creates an option with the specified value.
member.param: The value.

member.name: M:StevanFreeborn.Options.Option.None``1
member.summary: Creates an empty option.

member.name: M:StevanFreeborn.Options.Option.From``1(``0)
member.summary: Creates an option from the specified value, returning None if the value is null.
member.param: The value.
member.returns: An with the value if not null, otherwise None.

member.name: M:StevanFreeborn.Options.Option.FromT``1(``0)
member.summary: Converts a value to an .
member.param: The value.

member.name: T:StevanFreeborn.Options.Option`1
member.summary: Represents an optional value that may or may not be present.

member.name: P:StevanFreeborn.Options.Option`1.IsSome
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the option has a value.

member.name: P:StevanFreeborn.Options.Option`1.IsNone
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the option is empty.

member.name: P:StevanFreeborn.Options.Option`1.Value
member.summary: Gets the value of the option.
member.exception: Thrown when accessing Value on a None option.

member.name: M:StevanFreeborn.Options.Option`1.op_Implicit(`0)~StevanFreeborn.Options.Option{`0}
member.summary: Implicitly converts a value to an .
member.param: The value to convert.

member.name: M:StevanFreeborn.Options.Option`1.Deconstruct(System.Boolean@,`0@)
member.summary: Deconstructs the option into its components.
member.param: Indicates whether the option has a value.
The value of the option.

member.name: M:StevanFreeborn.Options.Option`1.Map``1(System.Func{`0,``0})
member.summary: Maps the value to a new type if the option has a value.
member.param: The function to map the value.
member.returns: A new with the mapped value if Some, otherwise None.

member.name: M:StevanFreeborn.Options.Option`1.Bind``1(System.Func{`0,StevanFreeborn.Options.Option{``0}})
member.summary: Binds to a new option if the current option has a value.
member.param: The function to bind to on Some.
member.returns: The result of the binder function if Some, otherwise None.

member.name: M:StevanFreeborn.Options.Option`1.Match``1(System.Func{`0,``0},System.Func{``0})
member.summary: Matches the option and returns a value based on whether it has a value.
member.param: The function to execute on Some.
The function to execute on None.
member.returns: The result of the appropriate function.
member.exception: Thrown when onSome or onNone is null.

member.name: M:StevanFreeborn.Options.Option`1.Match(System.Action{`0},System.Action)
member.summary: Matches the option and executes the appropriate action.
member.param: The action to execute on Some.
The action to execute on None.
member.exception: Thrown when onSome or onNone is null.

member.name: M:StevanFreeborn.Options.Option`1.Where(System.Func{`0,System.Boolean})
member.summary: Filters the option based on the specified predicate.
member.param: The predicate to filter with.
member.returns: The current option if Some and the predicate is met, otherwise None.

member.name: M:StevanFreeborn.Options.Option`1.GetValueOrDefault(`0)
member.summary: Gets the value of the option if Some, otherwise the specified default value.
member.param: The default value.
member.returns: The value if Some, otherwise the default value.

member.name: M:StevanFreeborn.Options.Option`1.GetValueOrDefault(System.Func{`0})
member.summary: Gets the value of the option if Some, otherwise the result of the specified factory function.
member.param: The factory function to provide the default value.
member.returns: The value if Some, otherwise the result of the factory function.

member.name: M:StevanFreeborn.Options.Option`1.OrElse(System.Func{StevanFreeborn.Options.Option{`0}})
member.summary: Returns the current option if Some, otherwise the result of the specified factory function.
member.param: The factory function to provide the fallback option.
member.returns: The current option if Some, otherwise the result of the factory function.

member.name: T:StevanFreeborn.Options.OptionAsyncExtensions
member.summary: Provides async extension methods for .

member.name: M:StevanFreeborn.Options.OptionAsyncExtensions.MapAsync``2(StevanFreeborn.Options.Option{``0},System.Func{``0,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``1}})
member.summary: Maps the value to a new type asynchronously if the option has a value.
member.param: The option.
The async function to map the value.
member.returns: A task containing a new with the mapped value if Some, otherwise None.
member.exception: Thrown when option or mapper is null.

member.name: M:StevanFreeborn.Options.OptionAsyncExtensions.BindAsync``2(StevanFreeborn.Options.Option{``0},System.Func{``0,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{StevanFreeborn.Options.Option{``1}}})
member.summary: Binds to a new async result if the current option has a value.
member.param: The option.
The async function to bind to on Some.
member.returns: A task containing the result of the binder function if Some, otherwise None.
member.exception: Thrown when option or binder is null.

member.name: M:StevanFreeborn.Options.OptionAsyncExtensions.MatchAsync``2(StevanFreeborn.Options.Option{``0},System.Func{``0,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``1}},System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``1}})
member.summary: Matches the option asynchronously and returns a value based on whether it has a value.
member.param: The option.
The async function to execute on Some.
The async function to execute on None.
member.returns: A task containing the result of the appropriate function.
member.exception: Thrown when option, onSome, or onNone is null.

member.name: M:StevanFreeborn.Options.OptionAsyncExtensions.WhereAsync``1(StevanFreeborn.Options.Option{``0},System.Func{``0,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{System.Boolean}})
member.summary: Filters the option asynchronously based on the specified predicate.
member.param: The option.
The async predicate to filter with.
member.returns: A task containing the current option if Some and the predicate is met, otherwise None.
member.exception: Thrown when option or predicate is null.

member.name: M:StevanFreeborn.Options.OptionAsyncExtensions.OrElseAsync``1(StevanFreeborn.Options.Option{``0},System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task{StevanFreeborn.Options.Option{``0}}})
member.summary: Returns the current option if Some, otherwise the result of the specified async factory function.
member.param: The option.
The async factory function to provide the fallback option.
member.returns: A task containing the current option if Some, otherwise the result of the factory function.
member.exception: Thrown when option or factory is null.
